word: H6903 - קְבֵל - qᵉbêl - keb-ale' - According to

sections.paragraph:
Original: קבל קבל

Transliteration: qebêl qŏbêl

Phonetic: keb-ale'

BDB Definition:

  1. front (substantive)
  2. in front of, before, because of, in view of, by reason of, because of this, therefore (preposition)
  3. because that, inasmuch as, although, according as, before (conjunction)
  4. accordingly, then (adverb)

Origin: corresponding to H6905

TWOT entry: 2965

Part(s) of speech:
